creator: andy.lavr@gmail.com
text:
/bin/sh /usr/ports/devel/liboil/work/gnome-libtool --tag=CC    --mode=link clang -msse -msse2 -Wall -D_BSD_SOURCE -D_GNU_SOURCE -I../.. -DOIL_ENABLE_UNSTABLE_API  -pipe -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Wformat-security -march=core2 -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing   -o libsse.la  libsse_la-clamp_sse.lo  libsse_la-composite_sse.lo libsse_la-composite_sse_2pix.lo  libsse_la-composite_sse_4pix.lo libsse_la-copy_sse.lo  libsse_la-math_sse.lo libsse_la-math_sse_unroll2.lo  libsse_la-multsum_sse.lo libsse_la-sad8x8_sse.lo  libsse_la-splat_sse.lo  
gnome-libtool: link: ar cru .libs/libsse.a .libs/libsse_la-clamp_sse.o .libs/libsse_la-composite_sse.o .libs/libsse_la-composite_sse_2pix.o .libs/libsse_la-composite_sse_4pix.o .libs/libsse_la-copy_sse.o .libs/libsse_la-math_sse.o .libs/libsse_la-math_sse_unroll2.o .libs/libsse_la-multsum_sse.o .libs/libsse_la-sad8x8_sse.o .libs/libsse_la-splat_sse.o 
gnome-libtool: link: ranlib .libs/libsse.a
gnome-libtool: link: ( cd ".libs" && rm -f "libsse.la" && ln -s "../libsse.la" "libsse.la" )
Making all in amd64
/bin/sh /usr/ports/devel/liboil/work/gnome-libtool  --tag=CC   --mode=compile clang -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../..    -Wall -D_BSD_SOURCE -D_GNU_SOURCE -I../.. -DOIL_ENABLE_UNSTABLE_API -pipe -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Wformat-security -march=core2 -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -MT libamd64_la-wavelet.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/libamd64_la-wavelet.Tpo -c -o libamd64_la-wavelet.lo `test -f 'wavelet.c' || echo './'`wavelet.c
gnome-libtool: compile:  clang -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../.. -Wall -D_BSD_SOURCE -D_GNU_SOURCE -I../.. -DOIL_ENABLE_UNSTABLE_API -pipe -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Wformat-security -march=core2 -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -MT libamd64_la-wavelet.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/libamd64_la-wavelet.Tpo -c wavelet.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/libamd64_la-wavelet.o

                   ~~~~~~~^~~
